title: Hairstyle Analysis Chart Using This Portrait

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a hairstyle analysis chart using this portrait. Show side-by-side hairstyle comparisons to highlight which hairstyles suit the subject best. Make it visual first, with only short labels and no paragraphs.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Create a hairstyle analysis chart using this portrait. Show side-by-side hairstyle comparisons to highlight which hairstyles suit the subject best. Make it visual first, with only short labels and no paragraphs.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

Create a hairstyle analysis chart using this portrait. Show side-by-side hairstyle comparisons to highlight which hairstyles suit the subject best. Make it visual first, with only short labels and no paragraphs.
promptTranslations.ru:
Используйте английский промпт ниже для генерации изображения; сохраняйте видимый текст, названия брендов, значения переменных и параметры на английском.

Create a hairstyle analysis chart using this portrait. Show side-by-side hairstyle comparisons to highlight which hairstyles suit the subject best. Make it visual first, with only short labels and no paragraphs.
promptTranslations.pt:
Use o prompt em inglês abaixo para gerar a imagem; mantenha textos visíveis, nomes de marca, valores de variáveis e parâmetros em inglês.

Create a hairstyle analysis chart using this portrait. Show side-by-side hairstyle comparisons to highlight which hairstyles suit the subject best. Make it visual first, with only short labels and no paragraphs.
promptTranslations.ja:
以下の英語画像生成プロンプトを使用してください。表示テキスト、ブランド名、変数値、パラメータは英語のまま保持します。

Create a hairstyle analysis chart using this portrait. Show side-by-side hairstyle comparisons to highlight which hairstyles suit the subject best. Make it visual first, with only short labels and no paragraphs.
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.

Create a hairstyle analysis chart using this portrait. Show side-by-side hairstyle comparisons to highlight which hairstyles suit the subject best. Make it visual first, with only short labels and no paragraphs.

imagePrompts.title: Hairstyle Analysis Chart

prompt: Create a hairstyle analysis chart using this portrait. Show side-by-side hairstyle comparisons to highlight which hairstyles suit the subject best. Make it visual first, with only short labels and no paragraphs.
originalPrompt: Create a hairstyle analysis chart using this portrait. Show side-by-side hairstyle comparisons to highlight which hairstyles suit the subject best. Make it visual first, with only short labels and no paragraphs.

promptTranslations.zh: 使用这张肖像创建发型分析图表。显示并排发型比较，以突出哪些发型最适合该主题。首先使其视觉化，只有短标签，没有段落。
promptTranslations.fr: Créez une grille d'analyse de coiffure à l'aide de ce portrait. Affichez des comparaisons de coiffures côte à côte pour mettre en évidence les coiffures qui conviennent le mieux au sujet. Rendez-le d'abord visuel, avec seulement des étiquettes courtes et aucun paragraphe.
promptTranslations.ru: Создайте диаграмму анализа прически, используя этот портрет. Покажите параллельное сравнение причесок, чтобы подчеркнуть, какие прически лучше всего подходят к теме. Сначала сделайте его визуальным, используя только короткие метки и никаких абзацев.
promptTranslations.pt: Crie um gráfico de análise de penteado usando este retrato. Mostre comparações de penteados lado a lado para destacar quais estilos de cabelo combinam melhor com o assunto. Torne-o visual primeiro, com apenas rótulos curtos e sem parágrafos.
promptTranslations.ja: この似顔絵を使って髪型診断チャートを作成します。ヘアスタイルを並べて比較して、どのヘアスタイルが被写体に最もよく合っているかを強調します。短いラベルのみを使用し、段落は含まず、まず視覚的に作成します。
promptTranslations.ko: 이 초상화를 사용하여 헤어스타일 분석 차트를 만듭니다. 어떤 헤어스타일이 주제에 가장 잘 어울리는지 강조하기 위해 헤어스타일을 나란히 비교하여 표시합니다. 단락 없이 짧은 레이블만 사용하여 먼저 시각적으로 만듭니다.
